training_status: 3 strength and one HIIT class weekly

benefits.description: Added energy peptides (SS31 and MOSTSC) to stack to support training
Visible muscle pop in legs and arms, stomach more filled out after two months of focusing on building muscle

protocol_notes: OP previously completed a round of Tesamorelin focused on leaning out, then transitioned to a muscle-building phase over approximately two months, adding SS31 and MOSTSC as energy peptides. Training included 3 strength sessions and 1 HIIT class weekly. Transition was partly motivated by community feedback and husband's concern about being too thin.
